channel.title: Summary Rules on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Summary Rules on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Log Analytics Summary Rules experience
item.description:
A new Azure portal experience for Summary Rules in Log Analytics is now generally available. Summary Rules aggregate high-volume log data on a defined schedule and store it in summarized tables for faster querying and reporting.

  • Source: Azure Updates
